Title: UWC'S HIRING REFUELERS
Description:
Hey!

DD from the United Wayfarers Club here.

The UWC offers repair, rearming and refuelling services across the UEE. It just so happens that we're on the look-out for new affiliates whose ships are fitted for refuelling. If you've got the fuel pods and like it when people are pleased to see you, the UWC might be the club for you.

And if you think it might be, I've got a live beacon you might like.

If you do happen to like it, a word to the wise: <EM4>make sure your fuel pods are full before you head out</EM4>.

A Club member has run out of fuel at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. I'm not sure on the details, like how they ended up out there with no Go Juice, but the UWC doesn't like to leave folk hanging.

The client vessel will pay you at the rate of <EM4>~mission(FuelRate) aUEC per SCU of Hydrogen</EM4> and  <EM4>~mission(QTFuelRate) aUEC per SCU of Quantum </EM4>. As a United Wayfarers Club contractor, you will also qualify for the UWC service fee listed above upon completion.

It's a straightforward run. Perfect if you want to get a feel for this kind of job. Get out there, fill up the tanks of their <EM4>~mission(Ship)</EM4> and get them on their way. Do enough runs like this, and the process becomes muscle memory. Until then, there's a <EM4>journal entry</EM4> on your mobiGlas called ""Refueling Protocols"" that covers the basics.

There have been no reports of outlaw activity in that sector, but stay alert. I always recommend you aim for a fast turnaround. The sooner you're done, the sooner I can fix you up with another contract. UWC's always looking for new affiliates. 

Looking forward to working with you.

Dina Deloit
Dispatch Hub
United Wayfarers Club
"We’ve got your back"
